summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing completed for StageConnect French internship & job platform. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI excellent with all core features working. Both demo authentication flows successful.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation timeout when clicking candidatures nav button

passed_tests: Landing page loads with correct CTAs
Auth page demo account buttons functional
Candidate dashboard navigation (profile, offres, candidatures, messages, calendrier)
Recruiter dashboard navigation (entreprise, publier, offres, candidats, messages, calendrier)
Manage Offers page with dropdown actions
Applicant Review page with offer selection
